description: JSON protocol serializer: X-Amz-Target header, JSON body from input value + shape definitions
JSON protocol response parser: JSON body -> serde_json::Value using shape definitions
JSON protocol error parsing: __type and message fields from JSON error response
REST-JSON protocol serializer: URI templates, headers, querystring, JSON body for remaining members
REST-JSON protocol response parser: headers + JSON body -> serde_json::Value
REST-XML protocol serializer: URI templates, headers, querystring, XML body for remaining members
REST-XML protocol response parser: headers + XML body -> serde_json::Value using shape definitions
EC2 query protocol variant: same as query but with different error XML format (<Response><Errors><Error>...)
Protocol dispatch in driver: select serializer/parser based on metadata.protocol (query, json, rest-json, rest-xml, ec2)
E2E: raws dynamodb list-tables --region us-east-1 works with JSON protocol against real AWS
E2E: raws s3api list-buckets works with REST-XML protocol against real AWS
E2E: raws lambda list-functions --region us-east-1 works with REST-JSON protocol against real AWS
